description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 4/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Document how host apps attach exporters without making it a beginner concern.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Documented the production exporter boundary in README.md: Jidoka keeps beginner debugging local, while host apps attach their own telemetry/exporter bridge to the runtime request/model/tool event families and Jidoka lifecycle events. Called out the correlation metadata keys that tie local Jidoka.Trace inspection to production observability backends. Verified with format, compile, full test suite, docs warnings-as-errors, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E8: Document how host apps attach exporters without making it a beginner concern
